markets.no_sub_title: Rain in NYC
markets.rules_primary: If the number of inches of precipitation recorded at Central Park, New York on March 13, 2026 is strictly greater than 0, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The Payout Criterion only encompasses Expiration Values that are strictly greater than  inches. If the Expiration Value is T (when the target is 0) for Trace or R for Record (where the record set is strictly greater than ), then the market resolves to Yes.

This market will close and expire the sooner of the first 10:00 AM ET following the release of data for March 13, 2026 or March 20, 2026.

If the Climatological Report is still inconclusive on March 20, 2026, Kalshi will reference the columns titled "Weather" and "1 Hour Precip (in)" in the NWS time series (https://www.weather.gov/wrh/timeseries?site=knyc) for determination via rule 7.2 of the rulebook.
